channel.title: Projects on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Multi-select fields for Projects and Issues in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Projects and Issue fields now support multi-select fields in public preview, allowing a single field to store multiple values. This lets you tag an item with all relevant labels or categories instead of choosing just one.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Saved views for repository issues – Public Preview and adjustable row heights in projects
item.description:
GitHub added saved views to repository Issues pages in public preview, allowing teams to create and share filtered issue views. The release also includes adjustable row heights in Projects.

  • Source: GitHub
